name: TrueNAS
author: IDKMANAGER
description: Monitors and controls one or more TrueNAS SCALE instances from the PegaProx panel (TrueCommand-style): pools/disks health, resilver/scrub progress, datasets, snapshots, shares, replication and apps/VMs over the JSON-RPC 2.0 WebSocket API. F1: full read-only monitoring (system/pools/datasets/snapshots/shares/replication/apps-vms) against the live-verified WS client; writes land in F2+.
